args.query: SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id, c.createddate AS createddate, c.closeddate AS closeddate, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds, cnts.cnt FROM casehistory__c ch JOIN ( SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c='Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c ) cnts ON ch.caseid__c = cnts.caseid__c JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND c.closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02' AND cnts.cnt = 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id, c.createddate AS createddate, c.closeddate AS closeddate, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds, cnts.cnt FROM casehistory__c ch JOIN ( SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c='Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c ) cnts ON ch.caseid__c = cnts.caseid__c JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND c.closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02' AND cnts.cnt = 1;

args.query: WITH cnts AS ( SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c='Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c ), cases AS ( SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts, cnts.cnt FROM "Case" c JOIN cnts ON cnts.caseid__c = c.id WHERE c.closeddate::timestamp BETWEEN '2023-05-02'::timestamp AND '2023-09-02'::timestamp ), assigns AS ( SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id FROM casehistory__c ch WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' ), agent_counts AS ( SELECT a.owner_id, COUNT(DISTINCT a.case_id) as processed_cases FROM assigns a JOIN cases cs ON cs.case_id = a.case_id GROUP BY a.owner_id ), agent_handles AS ( SELECT a.owner_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (cs.closed_ts - cs.created_ts)) as handle_seconds FROM assigns a JOIN cases cs ON cs.case_id = a.case_id WHERE cs.cnt = 1 ) SELECT ac.owner_id FROM agent_counts ac JOIN ( SELECT owner_id, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle FROM agent_handles GROUP BY owner_id ) ah ON ah.owner_id = ac.owner_id WHERE ac.processed_cases > 1 ORDER BY ah.avg_handle ASC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: WITH cnts AS ( SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c='Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c ), cases AS ( SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts, cnts.cnt FROM "Case" c JOIN cnts ON cnts.caseid__c = c.id WHERE c.closeddate::timestamp BETWEEN '2023-05-02'::timestamp AND '2023-09-02'::timestamp ), assigns AS ( SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id FROM casehistory__c ch WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' ), agent_counts AS ( SELECT a.owner_id, COUNT(DISTINCT a.case_id) as processed_cases FROM assigns a JOIN cases cs ON cs.case_id = a.case_id GROUP BY a.owner_id ), agent_handles AS ( SELECT a.owner_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (cs.closed_ts - cs.created_ts)) as handle_seconds FROM assigns a JOIN cases cs ON cs.case_id = a.case_id WHERE cs.cnt = 1 ) SELECT ac.owner_id FROM agent_counts ac JOIN ( SELECT owner_id, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle FROM agent_handles GROUP BY owner_id ) ah ON ah.owner_id = ac.owner_id WHERE ac.processed_cases > 1 ORDER BY ah.avg_handle ASC LIMIT 1;

args.query: WITH cnts AS ( SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c='Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c ), cases AS ( SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts, cnts.cnt FROM "Case" c JOIN cnts ON cnts.caseid__c = c.id WHERE c.closeddate::timestamp BETWEEN '2023-05-02'::timestamp AND '2023-09-02'::timestamp ), assigns AS ( SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, TRIM(ch.newvalue__c) AS owner_id FROM casehistory__c ch WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' ), agent_stats AS ( SELECT a.owner_id, COUNT(DISTINCT a.case_id) as processed_cases, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (cs.closed_ts - cs.created_ts))) as avg_handle_seconds FROM assigns a JOIN cases cs ON cs.case_id = a.case_id WHERE cs.cnt = 1 GROUP BY a.owner_id ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC ) SELECT * FROM agent_stats LIMIT 100;
